item.title: Gabbard’s 2020 Election Claims Put Her Back in Favor With Trump
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard has focused on attacking the so-called deep state after an uneven first year as the director of national intelligence.

item.title: Eating Kosher in the Heart of Syria: Lamb-Stuffed Zucchini but Hold the Yogurt
item.description: In the post-Assad era, more Jews are visiting a country that some fled decades ago. One hotel restaurant offers a corner where religious dietary requi...

item.title: Watch: A Conversation With Anna Wintour and Her U.S. Vogue Successor, Chloe Malle
item.description: In their first joint interview, Ms. Malle spoke about filling the shoes of Ms. Wintour, who urged people to “get over comparisons.”

item.title: A Campaign to Revoke the Endangerment Finding Appears Near ‘Total Victory’
item.description: A small group of conservative activists has worked for 16 years to stop all government efforts to fight climate change. Their efforts seem poised to p...

item.title: The End of Arms Control
item.description: We look at how world superpowers are approaching nuclear weapons.
